---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get In Touch

I am always open to connecting with fellow data professionals, potential employers, 
or anyone interested in the intersection of analytics and finance. Feel free to reach 
out through any of the channels below.

---

## 📬 Contact Information

| | |
|---|---|
| 📧 **Email** | [ruairi.c12@gmail.com](mailto:ruairi.c12@gmail.com) |
| 💼 **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/ruairi-c-02b268130](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruairi-c-02b268130/) |
| 🐙 **GitHub** | [github.com/RuairiCullen](https://github.com/RuairiCullen) |
| 📍 **Location** | Castleknock, Dublin 15, Ireland |

---

## 👤 References

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Professional and academic references are available on request. Please get in touch 
via email and I will provide full details promptly.
:::

---

## 📄 CV

You can download my full CV below:

[Download CV](cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
Whether you are a recruiter, a fellow student, or just curious about my work — 
I would love to hear from you. Check out my [projects](projects/index.qmd) or 
learn more [about me](about.qmd).
:::
